title: ‘I have a legal and a moral question’: My dad left when I was 9, reconnected with me in my 50s and now needs money. What do I owe him?
author: Quentin Fottrell
fullText: “After the divorce was finalized, he and his partner moved out of state to a place where there would be no child-support enforcement.”
summary: “After the divorce was finalized, he and his partner moved out of state to a place where there would be no child-support enforcement.”
